instant.evidence: Batch compilation step at final assembly; not a latency-bound interactive surface.

natural.evidence: Mechanical compiler; it transforms approved chapters and has no conversational surface.

permitted.evidence: Compiles only after all chapters are approved and quality gates pass; introduces no new content.

adaptive.evidence: Deterministic, mechanical assembly by design; intentionally does not learn or rewrite.

contextual.evidence: Assembles from approved chapters in exact outline order with cross-reference integrity checking.

transparent.evidence: Version tagging with change summaries; pre-delivery validation checklist; deterministic and auditable output.

governance.evidence: Hard precondition: compiles only post-approval and post-gates.

observability.evidence: version_manager tracks version number, date, and change summary per assembly.

availability.evidence: On-demand assembly step, not an always-on service.

lexicon.evidence: Enforces consistent terminology and heading hierarchy; prohibits inconsistent terminology.

solid.evidence: Mechanical, no rewriting; deterministic document_assembler / template_renderer / version_manager.

layers.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
layers.how: Final composition step assembling approved chapters into one artifact.

layers.name: Observability & Feedback
layers.how: version_manager records versions and change summaries.
